channel.title: CrossWire
channel.description: Twice-daily Hermes Agent ecosystem intelligence — releases, community builds, trending issues, articles, and tutorials.

item.title: CrossWire — Morning Brief, July 22
item.description:
Release Radar — Hermes Agent v0.19.0 (The Quicksilver Release)

Released July 20 · Full release notes

This is the biggest single release window yet ~2,245 commits, ~1,065 PRs, ~3,300 closed issues, 450+ contributors. Most of it is about speed and reliability.

What matters for MOCR

  • Smart approvals default. Hermes reviews flagged commands independently instead of asking every time. Deny rules work even under yolo mode. Details
  • Subagent live transcripts. Watch delegate_task workers in real-time. Durable completions survive crashes. Details
  • Delivery-obligation ledger. Finished answers survive gateway crashes and redeliver on next boot. Details
  • Profile-based routing. One gateway, multiple isolated profiles for different channels. Details
  • 80% faster cold start. ~4.3s to ~0.9s first-turn latency on every surface. Details

Bottom line: Smart approvals and durable delegation are the headline features. Worth updating for the delivery-obligation ledger alone.

New Community Builds

161 new repos this week.

  • design-judge-skills Star 234. Evidence-driven Agent Skills for design award research.
  • frakio-work Star 47. Multi-agent workbench stitching Codex + Hermes + Arc.
  • hermes-improvements Star 6. Vector memory, adaptive soul, workflow classification. Directly relevant.
  • agent-console Star 3. Browser-based mission control. Posted today.

Gaining Popularity

  • hermes-browser-extension Star 1090. Browser side panel for Hermes. 1K+ stars in a month.
  • Hermex Star 899. Native iPhone app for Hermes.
  • mind Star 58. Persistent memory for coding agents with automatic capture and recall.

Trending on GitHub

  • PR 69511 — Streaming conversational TTS with barge-in. Interrupt the agent while it speaks. Voice interactions become actually conversational. Worth watching.
  • PR 68229 — Desktop /compress cluster salvage. Fixes a compression bug in the desktop app. Clean engineering from ethernet8023.
  • PR 66520 — Migrate CI to GKE self-hosted runners. Infrastructure maturity signal at Nous.

Worth Reading

  • Nous Research in talks for 75M funding at 1.5B valuation (TechCrunch). Robot Ventures leading, USV participating. The valuation validates the agent platform thesis.
  • Hermes Agent 2026: Release Tracker (PetronellaTech). Good reference page bookmark.

New Tutorials

  • Hermes Agent Fundamentals In 29 Minutes Tina Huang. 54K views, 1 day old.
  • 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 19 minutes Alex Finn. 51K views, 10 days old.
  • Hermes Agent Full Course & Setup Guide Tech With Tim. 83K views.
